strengths: Strong distributed-systems and high-throughput backend background, including microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby
Current hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing up-to-date technical relevance
Broad polyglot engineering depth across backend, frontend, embedded, and open-source platform development spanning 17+ years
concerns: All roles are individual-contributor; no evidence of engineering leadership, team management, hiring, or organizational scaling
Agentic AI experience is limited to current role (2 months) and framed as tooling/infrastructure contribution, not production multi-agent system ownership
No fintech-specific experience in credit systems, risk modeling, payment flows, or regulated financial environments
response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished senior individual contributor with genuine technical breadth and early agentic-AI exposure, but the role demands an executive who has already scaled engineering organizations, shipped production multi-agent systems in regulated environments, and operated fintech infrastructure at risk — none of which appear in this resume. The gap between the candidate's current seniority level and the CTO mandate is too wide to bridge with technical depth alone.
